title: Statistician

rationales.taskAutomation: AI can run standard hypothesis tests, build regression and forecasting models, and generate results write-ups end to end; designing novel study methodology and defending causal claims stay human-led.
rationales.toolMaturity: Statistical and ML tooling (R, Python stacks, AutoML, agentic notebook assistants) is mature and widely embedded in analytics workflows.
rationales.adoption: Large employers in tech, pharma, insurance, and government agencies routinely use AI-assisted statistical modeling in production analytics.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run full analysis pipelines, from data cleaning through model fitting to draft reporting, under a statistician's review of assumptions and study design.

tasksAtRisk: Standard hypothesis testing and regression modeling
Automated data cleaning and exploratory analysis pipelines
Forecasting model builds using established methods
Drafting results sections and statistical summary reports
tasksGrowing: Novel study design and causal inference methodology
Defending statistical conclusions to regulators and stakeholders
Auditing AI model bias and validity in high-stakes decisions
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-2041, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Agentic notebooks now run entire analysis pipelines from cleaning to draft reporting. Statisticians who own study design, causal reasoning, and validity auditing of AI-generated results are moving from technician to the analysis's final authority.
